title: Prologue · Setup
subtitle: Install your AI coding assistant and experience the describe-generate-preview loop.
description: Two short levels get you ready for the course: set up an AI coding assistant, create your first page, and understand the core vibe coding workflow.

rank_reward.name: AI Starter
rank_reward.subtitle: Tools installed and first AI-built page shipped

completion_message: Your tool is ready and your first AI-built web page exists. From here on, the course is about repeating that loop with more useful products.
